# Check prints declaration-level and file-level summaries.
exec gorelo check 'Server -> target.go'
stdout 'move.*type.*Server'
stdout 'create.*target\.go'
stdout 'modify.*server\.go'

-- go.mod --
module example.com/test

go 1.21
-- server.go --
package main

type Server struct{}

func NewServer() *Server { return &Server{} }
